title: Jineric Mod
description: A mod focused on expanding and enhancing the vanilla Minecraft experience.
body:
# A Very Jineric Mod
A mod made to enhance the gameplay experience by expanding upon vanilla features, or adding new ones! Generally, most features are intended to stay within the design philosophy of existing features.

⚠️ [This is a BETA VERSION - If you find any bugs, report them here!](https://github.com/Jiingy/Jineric-Mod/issues) ⚠️

## -=- New Blocks -=-

### - New Block Sets 
Adds new block sets for of vanilla blocks, such as Stone, Dripstone, Tuff, Soul Sandstone, and more!
![Stone](https://i.imgur.com/NJHa1nG.png)

![Soul Sandstone](https://i.imgur.com/R1MHLEl.png)


### - Consistent Slab Stairs & Walls 
Lots of vanilla blocks do not have slabs stairs or walls, this aims to fix that!
Even more to find than shown here
![Slab Stairs Walls](https://i.imgur.com/rsUMhvE.png)


### - New Wooden Blocks 
#### Bookshelves - Can be used for enchanting tables
![Bookshelves](https://i.imgur.com/tocSyVK.png)

#### Chests - Featuring single & double variants
![Chests](https://i.imgur.com/tPRA1AY.png)

#### Ladders - New crafting recipes
![Ladders](https://i.imgur.com/0xCquSS.png)
![Recipes for ladders](https://i.imgur.com/KH9Ac96.gif)


### - Item Storage Blocks
Many items in the game have a counterpart block to allow the player to easily store mass amounts of them, which is great, but some blocks unfortunately do not such as fotten flesh, sugar, sticks, and enderpearls. This aims to fix that!
![Item Storage Blocks](https://i.imgur.com/qIMXdun.png)

## -=- New Potions -=-
Lots of effects do not have potions, leaving the player to not be able to consistently obtain them in survival.
#### Potion of Glowing
![Glowing potion](https://i.imgur.com/giTK6O5.png)
#### Potion of Darkness
![Darkness potion](https://i.imgur.com/atynihU.png)
